title: Treasure Map Coordinates
description: This mod gives you coordinates of the structure that is on the treasure map that you are holding
body:
This mod gives you coordinates of the structure that is on the treasure map that you are holding

Use command **/mapcoords** while holding a treasure map in your main or off hand

Also you can copy coordinates to clipboard by clicking the message

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c4a718b5723ecaf3780564e490be756985e3652.png)
